designs.name: partys1
designs.description: The dress has thin spaghetti straps, a gentle cowl neckline, and a mid‑calf length with a subtle side slit. She pairs it with strappy nude heels and a minimalist silver necklace

designs.name: partys2
designs.description: A man stands in a modern indoor party setting wearing a black slim‑fit shirt tucked neatly into grey tailored trousers. The shirt has a subtle sheen, long sleeves rolled just above the wrists, and a structured collar. He pairs it with black loafers and a sleek silver watch.
